author: nflaig
content: I do think "act as a builder" is nice to have but there is also open source builder software you can run in a non sophisticated way, so I don't even see it as necessary to have this at gloas fork

author: barnabasbusa
content: but also the lack of any bakes in client implementation goes against the spirit of epbs 😄

author: potuz
content: I completely agree that having the "act as a builder" is a nice to have and should be purely optional. Having said so, Prysm will surely have this (and I hope to have it end to end today) and I wish the external builder API does not make it harder for Prysm to implement its own "act as a builder" with its REST client

content: you can always add this later, and I wanna add it, but it's on page 30 on the epbs todo list

content: really my main motivation to implement this is to have an educated opinion on how the beacon api should look like
